heading: Multi-Cloud Cluster Considerations
body:
If you have a [Configure High Availability and Workload Isolation](create-cluster-multi-region),
your BI Connector connection string may include the cloud provider
type (`.gcp` or `.azure`). In the event of a failover in which nodes
on one cloud provider fail and requests are routed to nodes in another cloud
provider, your BI Connector connection string may change.

To mitigate this hazard, add [Analytics Nodes for Workload Isolation](deploy-analytics-nodes)
to clusters deployed only in one cloud provider and set the BI Connector
[Create a Cluster Page](bic-read-preferences) to **Analytics**.
This ensures that your connection string remains constant.
